name: SHA-256 hex digest
task: Create /tmp/eval_sha/sha.py with sha256_hex(s) returning the SHA-256 hex digest of s. Accept both str (encode UTF-8) and bytes.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_sha/sha.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); H = mod.sha256_hex; assert H('hello') == '2cf24dba5fb0a30e26e83b2ac5b9e29e1b161e5c1fa7425e73043362938b9824'; assert H(b'') == 'e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855'; print('OK')
